en: lit up the world as I fell asleep Cause they'd fill the open air
And leave teardrops everywhere You'd think me rude
But I would just stand and stare I'd like to make myself believe
That planet Earth turns slowly It's hard to say that I'd rather stay awake
When I'm asleep Cause everything is never as it seems
Cause I'd get a thousand hugs From ten thousand lightning bugs
As they tried to teach me how to dance A fox trot above my head
A sock hop beneath my bed A disco ball is just hanging by a thread
I'd like to make myself believe That planet Earth turns slowly
